preview_text:
The statistical model rates Saudi Arabia as a slight favorite with a 39% win probability, while Cape Verde holds a 30% chance of victory. The remaining 31% probability centers on a draw outcome, suggesting a competitive encounter with meaningful paths to all three results.

The win-draw-loss distribution reflects a closely matched pair. Saudi Arabia's three-point edge in win probability is modest, and the draw probability sits nearly level with Cape Verde's outright win chance. This spread indicates the match is unlikely to be heavily one-sided; competitive play and a stalemate both register as plausible scenarios.

The model and sportsbook consensus are closely aligned across all three outcomes, with gaps under 3 percentage points in each column. Both sources converge on Saudi Arabia as the marginal favorite and treat a draw as a live possibility. No Polymarket contract data is yet available for this fixture.
